description: Known AI provider-cost gaps allowed temporarily after Phase 3.9. Member image, music, and video are intentionally excluded because they are gateway-migrated.

knownGaps.reason: Admin-only provider-cost text test remains unmetered and lacks explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Admin-only route remains accepted only while Phase 4.2 defines platform admin lab budget contract/helpers.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; a later narrow admin text route migration must require the target kill switch before provider calls.

knownGaps.reason: Phase 4.3 hardens the charged Admin BFL image-test path with admin_org_credit_account budget-policy metadata, but the unmetered admin image branch still needs explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Only the unmetered admin image branch is baselined; charged BFL admin image tests are hardened through the selected-organization credit path.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: A later narrow admin image route phase should either disable unpriced provider-cost tests or move them to platform_admin_lab_budget controls without changing the charged BFL org-credit path.

knownGaps.reason: Admin-only embeddings test remains unmetered and lacks explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Admin-only route is not product-facing and remains accepted only until platform admin lab budget policy exists.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; a later admin embeddings migration must keep the route admin-only and fail closed before provider calls when disabled.

knownGaps.reason: Admin-only music test remains unmetered and lacks explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Admin-only music tests can spend provider budget and remain accepted only as an explicit Phase 4.2 design gap.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; a later admin music route migration must use platform admin lab budget limits before provider calls.

knownGaps.reason: Synchronous admin video debug route is default-disabled but still needs explicit platform budget telemetry if retained.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Route is default-disabled and accepted only while Phase 4.2 defines explicit emergency/debug budget controls.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; the debug route should remain disabled unless both debug and budget kill switches are intentionally enabled.

knownGaps.reason: Admin compare can trigger multiple provider calls and lacks explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Admin compare remains accepted only while Phase 4.2 defines multi-call platform lab budget policy.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; a later compare migration must account for multi-call provider fanout before execution.

knownGaps.reason: Admin streaming live-agent route can consume provider tokens until stream end and lacks explicit platform budget telemetry.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Admin live-agent remains accepted only while Phase 4.2 defines stream-session budget controls.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.2 admin AI budget policy contract/helpers
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.2 defines pure budget policy helpers; a later live-agent migration must add stream-session budget limits before provider streaming.

knownGaps.reason: OpenClaw/News Pulse visual generation spends platform AI budget outside member/org billing and needs explicit budget policy.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: News Pulse visuals are bounded by existing status/attempt rows but lack explicit budget caps until Phase 4.6.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.6 OpenClaw/News Pulse visual budget controls
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.6 should add OpenClaw/News Pulse visual budget caps and a provider-call kill switch around existing visual status rows.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker text/image/embeddings routes are service-only and rely on caller-side gateway or admin policy controls.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and remain accepted only while caller-policy guard design is implemented.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.7 internal AI Worker route caller-policy guard
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.7 should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for internal text/image/embeddings routes and keep them service-only.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker music/video/compare/live-agent routes are service-only and rely on caller-side gateway or admin policy controls.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and remain accepted only while caller-policy guard design is implemented.
knownGaps.targetFuturePhase: Phase 4.7 internal AI Worker route caller-policy guard
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Phase 4.7 should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for internal music/video/compare/live-agent routes and keep them service-only.
